RawBus.description: Intermediate type for a single bus entry.

deficit_segments.description:
Optional entity-level deficit segment overrides.
When absent, the global defaults from `penalties.json` are used.

id.description: Bus identifier. Must be unique within the file.

RawDeficitSegment.description: Intermediate type for a single deficit segment entry.

cost.description: Cost per `MWh` of deficit in this segment [$/`MWh`].

depth_mw.description: MW depth of this segment. `null` means unbounded (last segment only).

description: Top-level intermediate type for `buses.json` (serde only, not re-exported).
title: RawBusFile
